liquibase.plugin.PluginFactory

  • Packages that use PluginFactory 
    Package Description
    liquibase.change
    The change package contains the available database "changes".

    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem  
    liquibase.hub

    liquibase.logging

    • Uses of PluginFactory in liquibase.change

      Classes in liquibase.change that implement PluginFactory 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ChangeFactory
      Factory class for constructing the correct liquibase.change.Change implementation based on a command name.

    • Uses of PluginFactory in liquibase.plugin

      Classes in liquibase.plugin that implement PluginFactory

      class  AbstractPluginFactory<T extends Plugin>
      Convenience base class for all factories that find correct Plugin implementations.
